articles.title: Russian soldiers tell BBC they saw fellow troops executed on commanders' orders
articles.summary: Four men expose the horror and brutality of conditions in the Ukraine war, with two saying they saw soldiers being shot for refusing orders.

articles.title: Mexico sends thousands of soldiers to stop violence after death of drug lord
articles.summary: A wave of violence has erupted across Mexico since a powerful drug cartel boss died following his capture by special forces.

articles.title: More than 5,000 flights cancelled as US east coast digs out of record snow
articles.summary: A major snowstorm dumps more than a foot of snow in several areas, bringing power cuts and disruption.

articles.title: French minister moves to block US envoy Kushner from government access
articles.summary: The minister says Charles Kushner, father of Trump's son-in-law Jared, failed to explain comments about violence in France.

articles.title: Ukraine negotiator tells BBC how it feels to sit across table from Russia
articles.summary: Sergiy Kyslytsya is among those trying to negotiate an end to the conflict, which is entering its fifth year.

articles.title: Robert Carradine, Lizzie Mcguire and Revenge of the Nerds star, dies aged 71
articles.summary: His family says the actor took his own life after living with bipolar disorder for nearly two decades.

articles.title: Probe under way after illness kills 72 tigers in Thai tourist park
articles.summary: Authorities say samples showed the canine distemper virus, but have not confirmed where it came from.

articles.title: US partially evacuates Beirut embassy amid rising Iran tensions
articles.summary: The State Department has ordered non-essential staff to leave the embassy in Beirut after a security review.

articles.title: Trump threatens countries that 'play games' with existing trade deals
articles.summary: The threat comes after the Supreme Court ruled on Friday that Trump had exceeded his authority in enacting a sweeping global programme of tariffs.

articles.title: Explosion near Moscow rail hub kills police officer
articles.summary: The unidentified suspect also died and two other officers were injured, Russian officials say.
